ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tax_groups" (
  "id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the tax group */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tax group (e.g., VAT 23%) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tax group */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Tax rate (in decimal form, e.g., 0.23 for 23%) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the tax group becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the tax group expires (null if no expiration) */,
  "country_id" TEXT /* Reference to the country where the tax group applies */,
  "tax_receivable_account_id" TEXT /* Account ID for tax receivables */,
  "tax_payable_account_id" TEXT /* Account ID for tax payables */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_groups_tax_payable_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_payable_account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_groups_tax_receivable_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_receivable_account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_groups_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., receivable, payable) */,
  "balance" TEXT /* Current balance of the account */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number (e.g., bank account number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_rates" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the tax rate */,
  "tax_group_id" TEXT /* Reference to the tax group */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Tax rate (in decimal form, e.g., 0.23 for 23%) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the tax rate becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the tax rate expires (null if no expiration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rates_tax_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_group_id") REFERENCES tax_groups ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the tax report */,
  "tax_group_id" TEXT /* Reference to the tax group associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "total_collected" TEXT /* Total amount of tax collected */,
  "total_paid" TEXT /* Total amount of tax paid */,
  "prepared_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who prepared the report */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who reviewed the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_reports_prepared_by FOREIGN KEY ("prepared_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_reports_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_reports_tax_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_group_id") REFERENCES tax_groups ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., finance staff, auditor, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission (e.g., view tax reports, edit tax groups) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the audit trail */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed (e.g., login, logout, edit tax group) */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
